description: Convert tabular data between csv, json, parquet, and excel.

tools.description:
Converts tabular data between csv, json, jsonl, parquet, xlsx, tsv, and txt formats.

When to use: Use when the user asks to convert, reformat, transform, or export a data file from one tabular format to another (e.g. 'turn this csv into parquet', 'export to excel', 'flatten jsonl into csv').

How to discover inputs: If the user names a stored file but not a path, FIRST call CatalogFileTool(operation='list', source_uri='master:<cat>.<sch>.<vol>:/') or WorkspaceFileTool(operation='list', source_uri='workspace:/') to find it. Prefer the unified `source_uri`/`dest_uri` URI form (`master:cat.sch.vol:/path` or `workspace:/path`) over legacy `input_path`/`output_path`. Use inline `content` only for small csv/json snippets pasted into the chat.

How to communicate: Report row count, source and destination formats, and the final URI written. Do not echo full file bodies for large outputs.

Example: {source_uri:'master:sales_catalog.raw.uploads:/q1_orders.csv', dest_uri:'workspace:/exports/q1_orders.parquet', to_format:'parquet'}.

schema.name: from_format
schema.description: Source file format. Optional when `source_uri` or `input_path` is supplied — format is auto-detected from the path extension (e.g. `.csv` -> `csv`). Set explicitly only when the extension is missing or misleading. Default: `csv`.

schema.name: to_format
schema.description: Target file format to convert into. Required when it differs from the source. Choose `parquet`/`xlsx` for binary tabular exports, `csv`/`tsv`/`json`/`jsonl`/`txt` for text. Default: `json`.

schema.name: content
schema.description: Inline source data as a raw csv or json string. Use ONLY for small text snippets pasted in the chat. Mutually exclusive with `input_path` and `source_uri`; required when neither of those is given.

schema.name: input_path
schema.description: Legacy workspace path to read from, resolved relative to `base_dir` (default `/workspace`). Prefer `source_uri` with the `workspace:/` scheme instead. Mutually exclusive with `content` and `source_uri`.

schema.name: output_path
schema.description: Legacy workspace path to write to, resolved relative to `base_dir`. Prefer `dest_uri` instead. Required for parquet/xlsx output when no `dest_uri` is given.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: Fully-qualified URI of the source file. Format: `master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>` for catalog volumes or `workspace:/<path>` for the user workspace. Preferred over `input_path`. When `from_format` is omitted, format is detected from the URI's extension. Required unless `content` or `input_path` is given.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: Fully-qualified URI to write the converted output to. Same URI grammar as `source_uri` (`master:cat.sch.vol:/path` or `workspace:/path`). Preferred over `output_path`. Required for parquet/xlsx output when no `output_path` is supplied.

_confDescriptions.base_dir: Root workspace directory for resolving input_path/output_path. Paths outside this dir are rejected (default /workspace).
_confDescriptions.max_rows: Maximum number of rows to read/write; returns truncated:true when hit (default 100000).
_confDescriptions.max_bytes: Cap on response/file bytes; returns truncated:true when hit (default 104857600 = 100MB). Also applies to bytes read from source_uri and written to dest_uri.
_confDescriptions.source_uri: AIDP URI to read the source file via the shared aidp_io module. Accepts master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>, workspace:/<path>, or the alias <catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>. When from_format is not set, it is detected from the URI's path extension.
_confDescriptions.dest_uri: AIDP URI to write the converted output via the shared aidp_io module. Same URI forms as source_uri. Required for binary outputs (parquet/excel) when no output_path is supplied.
